title: Munin Skirata
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image= |name=Munin Skirata |homeworld= |birth=Before [[64 BBY/Legends|64 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] **[[Clan Skirata]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'm going to make a soldier of you.''"
"''Why?''"
"''It's a noble profession. You're tough and smart, and you'll be a great soldier. It's what Mandalorians do.|Munin Skirata and Falin Mattran|''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''}} '''Munin Skirata''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], and member of [[Clan Skirata]]. On a particular mission to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Surcaris]], he found a young boy named Falin Mattran, living on the war-torn streets and surviving on his own. Impressed with the boy, Skirata took it upon himself to train the boy as a Mandalorian and later adopt Mattran as his own son, giving him the new name of [[Kal Skirata]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Why didn't you kill me? You kill everyone else.''"
"''Because you don't have parents, and me and my missus don't have a son, so it sort of makes sense that we do what Mandalorians always do—that we take you in, train you, set you up to be a soldier and a father yourself. Don't you want that?|Falin Mattran and Munin Skirata|}} Approximately fifty years before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] and the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Munin Skirata and a group of other [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] came to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Surcaris]] to fight. While there, Skirata found a seven-year-old boy, Falin Mattran, living on the streets like a wild animal. The boy had attacked Skirata with his [[Death/Legends|dead]] father's three-sided [[Knife/Legends|knife]], but Skirata was able to calm Mattran and took the child with him back to the Mandalorians' camp. He would call the boy "Kal"—"knife" in [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']]—and, confiding in his comrade [[Jun Hokan]], Munin expressed his pride in the courageous young boy. As he shared a bowl of soup with Mattran in the camp, Skirata told him of his intentions to adopt him and explained the allure of a chance at a new life. Although initially hesitant, Mattran quickly warmed up to Munin when the veteran soldier comforted the traumatized child after he had nightmares about his dead father and destroyed home. Munin would indeed adopt Falin, from then on known as Kal Skirata, as his son and raise him as a Mandalorian. Years after Munin had passed away, Kal would pass his [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|armor]] on to [[Bardan Jusik]], a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who would leave the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to become a Mandalorian, and later become Kal's adopted son and Munin's adopted grandson. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Munin Skirata |pl=Munin Skirata }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skirata, Munin}} [[Category:Clan Skirata]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
